name: Apple Pie - Italian Crostata Di Mele)
recipeIngredient: Tart Dough (see recipe or use favorite recipe)
6 medium cooking apples; pared and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in your tart dough recipe.
2. Roll out your tart dough on a floured surface and transfer it to a 9-inch pie dish.
3. In a large bowl, combine the thinly sliced apples with lemon juice.
4. Sprinkle sugar over the apple slices.
5. Arrange the apple slices in the prepared tart shell.
6. Cover the pie with the top crust and crimp the edges.
7. Place the pie on a baking sheet to catch any drips.
8. Bake according to your tart dough recipe until golden brown.
9. Allow the pie to cool completely before serving.
